metadata.title: AI Music Generator
metadata.description: Create songs, instrumentals, melodies, and background music from text prompts with OneAIHub.

page.title: AI Music Generator
page.description: Turn ideas, lyrics, genres, moods, and instruments into AI-generated songs or background tracks.

generator.title: Music Generator
generator.model_notice: Model names are shown for transparency. They belong to their respective owners and do not imply endorsement by or affiliation with OneAIHub. Availability, quality, and generation behavior may change over time.
generator.prompt_placeholder: Describe the genre, mood, instruments, tempo, vocals, and where the music will be used.
generator.waiting_generation: Please wait while OneAIHub creates your music.

form.title: Title
form.style_placeholder: synth pop, bright melody, clean drums, 120 BPM, cinematic intro
form.prompt_placeholder: Upbeat synth pop background music for a product launch, bright melody, clean drums, no vocals
form.lyrics_placeholder: Add your lyrics for a structured song. Two short verses work best.
